title: Add Rust backend command to detect Claude Code installation
description:
Add a Tauri command that checks if Claude Code is installed on the system. Detection should work on macOS, Windows, and Linux by checking common installation paths and the PATH.

Implementation notes:
- Check common install paths on each platform
- Return installation status: not_installed, installing, installed
- Return installed version if detected
acceptanceCriteria: Command returns proper JSON structure with status and version
Tests for Claude Code detection command pass

title: Add Rust backend command to install Claude Code
description:
Add a Tauri command that downloads and installs Claude Code on the system. The installation should be automated and show progress.

Implementation notes:
- Download Claude Code installer from official source
- Run installer with appropriate flags for automated installation
- Support macOS (pkg/dmg), Windows (msi/exe), Linux (AppImage/deb)
- Return installation progress and result
acceptanceCriteria: Command downloads from official Anthropic source
Tests for Claude Code installation command pass

title: Add Rust backend command to open folder in file explorer
description:
Add a Tauri command that opens a specified folder in the system's file explorer (Finder on macOS, Explorer on Windows, file manager on Linux).

Implementation notes:
- Use platform-specific commands: open/xdg-open/explorer
acceptanceCriteria: Works on macOS (Finder), Windows (Explorer), Linux (file manager)
Tests for open folder command pass

title: Add Rust backend command to launch Claude Code with folder
description:
Add a Tauri command that launches Claude Code application with a specified working directory.

Implementation notes:
- Use platform-specific app launching
- Pass the working directory as argument to Claude Code
acceptanceCriteria: Launches Claude Code with specified folder as working directory

title: Add frontend TypeScript API bindings for Claude Code commands
description:
Add TypeScript bindings in the frontend to call the new Rust backend commands.

Implementation notes:
- Create src/lib/api/claudeCode.ts with invoke wrappers
- Add proper TypeScript types for the responses
acceptanceCriteria: Add claudeCodeApi with methods: checkInstallation, install, openFolder, launch
Proper TypeScript types for all API methods

title: Create Claude Code Starter page component structure
description:
Create the main page component for the Claude Code Starter feature.

Implementation notes:
- Create src/components/claude-code-starter/ClaudeCodeStarterPage.tsx
- Use existing UI components from src/components/ui/
- Follow the pattern of other pages like SkillsPage
acceptanceCriteria: Uses existing UI components (Button, Card, etc.)

title: Add installation status display UI
description:
Add UI components to display the current Claude Code installation status.

Implementation notes:
- Show install status: not_installed, installing, installed
- Show version when installed
- Add visual indicators (icons, colors)
acceptanceCriteria: Shows three states: not installed, installing, installed

title: Add one-click install button UI
description:
Add a prominent button for one-click Claude Code installation.

Implementation notes:
- Large, friendly button targeting novice users
- Shows loading state during installation
- Shows success state after installation
acceptanceCriteria: Button text: Install Claude Code / Installing... / Installed

title: Add folder selector for working directory
description:
Add UI for users to select a working folder where Claude Code will be launched.

Implementation notes:
- Use Tauri dialog plugin for folder selection
- Display selected folder path
- Allow changing the folder

title: Add launch button to open folder and start Claude Code
description:
Add the main action button that opens the selected folder in file explorer and launches Claude Code.

Implementation notes:
- Button text: Open Folder and Start Claude Code
- First opens folder in explorer, then launches Claude Code
- Show loading state during launch
acceptanceCriteria: Opens folder in explorer first, then launches Claude Code
Handles errors gracefully with toast notifications

title: Integrate Claude Code Starter page into App navigation
description:
Add the new page to the main App.tsx routing and navigation.

Implementation notes:
- Add claudeCodeStarter to View type
- Add component import and conditional rendering
- Add navigation menu item or button to access the page
acceptanceCriteria: Add claudeCodeStarter to View type in App.tsx
Add navigation entry (sidebar button or header menu)
Component renders correctly when navigated to

title: Add i18n translations for the new page
description:
Add internationalization support for the Claude Code Starter page.

Implementation notes:
- Add translation keys for all UI text
- Support English and Chinese (existing languages)
acceptanceCriteria: Add translation keys in English locale
Add translation keys in Chinese locale
All UI text uses t() translation function
